sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the white corner pixels of each N cross
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
w_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'w']

# For each N cross, find adjacent w pixels and try clicking them
print(f"N nodes: {len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    center_r = (min_r + max_r) // 2
    center_c = (min_c + max_c) // 2
    print(f"\n  N cross: rows {min_r}-{max_r}, cols {min_c}-{max_c}")
    
    # Try clicking on the 4 corner positions
    corners = [(min_r, min_c), (min_r, max_c), (max_r, min_c), (max_r, max_c)]
    for cr, cc in corners:
        print(f"  Clicking corner ({cr}, {cc})...")
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': cr, 'col': cc}])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
        print(f"    N: {len(N_nodes)}, done: {result.get('done')}")
        if result.get('done') or len(N_nodes) < 4:
            break
    if len(N_nodes) < 4:
        break

# If corners didn't work, try the white squares to the left/right
if len(N_nodes) >= 4:
    print("\nTrying white squares to the left of each cross...")
    for n in N_nodes:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        center_r = (min_r + max_r) // 2
        # Click left of the cross
        target_c = min_c - 1
        print(f"  Clicking ({center_r}, {target_c})...")
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_r, 'col': target_c}])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
        print(f"    N: {len(N_nodes)}, done: {result.get('done')}")
        if result.get('done') or len(N_nodes) < 4:
            break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
